Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import openpyxl
import json

file_path = '/Users/pernillakallhammar/Downloads/Expenses/Kvittosammanställning 2026 Mars.xlsx'
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(file_path\)
ws = wb.active

print\("=== SHEET INFO ==="\)
print\(f"Sheet name: {ws.title}"\)
print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}"\)
print\(f"Max row: {ws.max_row}, Max col: {ws.max_column}"\)

print\("\\n=== COLUMN HEADERS ==="\)
headers = []
for col in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
    cell_value = ws.cell\(row=1, column=col\).value
    headers.append\(cell_value\)
    print\(f"Column {col}: {cell_value}"\)

print\("\\n=== EXAMPLE DATA ROWS ==="\)
for row_idx in range\(2, min\(6, ws.max_row + 1\)\):
    row_data = []
    for col in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
        cell = ws.cell\(row=row_idx, column=col\)
        value = cell.value
        cell_type = type\(value\).__name__
        row_data.append\(f"{value} \({cell_type}\)"\)
    print\(f"Row {row_idx}: {row_data}"\)

print\("\\n=== DATA TYPES BY COLUMN ==="\)
for col_idx, header in enumerate\(headers, 1\):
    sample_values = []
    for row in range\(2, min\(6, ws.max_row + 1\)\):
        cell = ws.cell\(row=row, column=col_idx\)
        if cell.value is not None:
            sample_values.append\(type\(cell.value\).__name__\)
    print\(f"Column '{header}': {', '.join\(set\(sample_values\)\) if sample_values else 'Empty'}"\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd

file_path = '/Users/pernillakallhammar/Downloads/Expenses/Kvittosammanställning 2026 Mars.xlsx'

# Read the Excel file
df = pd.read_excel\(file_path\)

print\("=== COLUMN HEADERS/NAMES ==="\)
headers = df.columns.tolist\(\)
for i, header in enumerate\(headers, 1\):
    print\(f"Column {i}: {header}"\)

print\("\\n=== DATA SHAPE ==="\)
print\(f"Total rows: {len\(df\)}"\)
print\(f"Total columns: {len\(df.columns\)}"\)

print\("\\n=== FIRST 5 DATA ROWS ==="\)
for idx, row in df.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f"\\nRow {idx + 2}:"\)
    for col, value in row.items\(\):
        print\(f"  {col}: {value} \(type: {type\(value\).__name__}\)"\)
    if idx >= 4:  # Show first 5 rows \(0-4\)
        break

print\("\\n=== DATA TYPES BY COLUMN ==="\)
print\(df.dtypes\)

print\("\\n=== FULL DATAFRAME INFO ==="\)
print\(df.info\(\)\)

EOF)
